_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain deployable cyber defense audit toolkits
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Task SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.468), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.239). Shared vocabulary: [audit]. NICE-only terms [cyber, defense, deployable, maintain, toolkits] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, ai, application, controls, defenses, filtering] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.856, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 6-word NICE element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Maintain deployable cyber defense audit toolkits" and "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 > STS 0.239 (gap +0.265). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [audit] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [audit]. NICE-only: [cyber, defense, deployable, maintain, toolkits]. WIDAI-only: [access, ai, application, controls, defenses, filtering].
